---
toc: false
---

## Courage

Courage is ...


## Chapters in this section

::: {.section-card-grid}

::: {.section-card}
### Chapter 5: Help

blah blah blah

[Open Chapter 5](ch05-help.html){.section-button}
:::

::: {.section-card}
### Chapter 6: Missing Values

blah blah blah

[Open Chapter 6](ch06-missing-values.html){.section-button}
:::

:::

## What to focus on

As you work through courage ...
